description: During the high-stakes game, Enoch's system is remotely overridden, causing a scene in the casino. Fitz and Enoch are exposed as collaborators, and Enoch is identified as a synthetic being, leading to their capture and imprisonment in a casino cell with a dead gambler. Fitz attempts to repair Enoch, who is left deactivated, while the threat from the hunters grows.
location: Kitson (alien casino planet / House of Games)

transcript.line: Come on, green bean. I don't got all day.
Oh, God. No, please. No. No, no, oh, God. Oh, my God. Oh, please, please, please, please. No, no, no, no. Please, oh, God, oh, God.
Never hit on 4. Five players remain. As we begin Round 6. Players, please place your wagers. Would you like to place a wager, sir? Sir?
Sorry, yes. My turn. Hm. What are the odds of me getting a 7 or less?
Any dealer caught giving odds is fed to Mr. Kitson's Vrellnexian.
Sorry. I didn't know that. Uh, okay, hm. So, to hit or to fold... That is the question now.
A synth. Everybody, vacate the room. The two of you arrived together.
No, that was just a coincidence.
Which would explain your good fortune. See that he and his robot friend stay put. Mr. Kitson would want to deal with them personally.
Back away from the computer. Don't even think about it.
Totally evaporated. Big guy's two for two.
Yeah, well, he got away, big guy, and you totally destroyed our fuse box.
Oh. But where did he go?
The real question is, who was he trying to contact?
